untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Fibonacci retracement levels (38.2%, 61.8%, 78.6%) — not available as direct indicators; (2) Index component confirmation threshold (55%+ components moving in same direction) — no component-level composition data available in the indicator set; (3) Consecutive bar count validation (3+ bars beyond MA, retracement depth range validation) — cannot be expressed with allowed operators without array indexing. These are multi-bar pattern validations requiring lookback logic or external component data not present in the allowed indicator list.
translation_notes: Partial translation provided using trend-retracement-resumption approximation with pivot levels as proxy for retracement zones and support/resistance levels. However, the core signal logic around Fibonacci retracement validation and index component confirmation cannot be accurately translated without additional indicators or custom composite calculations. A full implementation would require: (1) explicit Fibonacci level calculations, (2) market breadth/component confirmation data, and (3) sequential bar pattern matching capability.
